info.title: DeepRaven
info.description: Long-lasting memory layer for sales agents — multi-tenant SaaS.

post.description:
Create a new account. Supabase sends a confirmation email.
If email confirmation is disabled in Supabase, a session is returned immediately.
Authenticate with email + password and return a Supabase JWT.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.

Send a password reset email. Supabase emails a link that points back to
GET /auth/confirm?token_hash=...&type=recovery

Set a new password using the access token obtained from the recovery callback.
Call this after the user has been redirected to /auth/confirm?type=recovery
and the dashboard has extracted the access_token from the URL fragment.

Verify the 6-digit OTP code sent to the user's email during signup.
Returns a full session on success.
Resend the signup confirmation OTP to the given email address.

schema.title: Response List Keys Api V1 Account Keys Get

post.description:
Create a new account-level API key.
The raw key is returned ONCE and is never stored — save it securely.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects Get
Response List Keys Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Keys Get

post.description:
Create a new API key for a project.
The raw key is returned ONCE in this response and is never stored.

get.description: Download all contact profiles for a project as a single JSON file.

schema.title: Response List Contacts Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Contacts Get

post.description:
Ingest conversation messages for a contact.
Stores immediately, then (re)sets the extraction window in Redis.
The worker processes all accumulated conversations once the window closes.
Accepts an API key or a JWT that owns the project.

get.description: Return the most recent N conversation records for a contact.

schema.title: Response Get Conversations Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Contacts  Contact Id  Conversations Get

delete.description: GDPR: Erase all conversation history for a contact.

get.description: Return the current profile for a contact. Creates an empty one if new.

delete.description: GDPR: Wipe all extracted profile data for a contact, leaving an empty profile.

get.description: Check whether profile extraction is currently running for this contact.

post.description:
Trigger LLM profile extraction in the background. Returns immediately.

- **force=false** (default): only processes new unprocessed conversations.
- **force=true**: reprocesses ALL conversations from scratch, fully overwrites the profile.
Same as /extract but synchronous — blocks until done and returns the updated profile.

get.description: Download a single contact's profile as a JSON file.

post.description:
Run compression on the current profile — trim bloat, newer wins.
Safe to call at any time; intended to be triggered manually or by the daily scheduler.

delete.description: Delete all data (contact, profile, conversations) for a contact.

get.description: Account-level counts: projects, contacts, conversations, total LLM tokens.

schema.title: Response Get Overview Api V1 Stats Overview Get

get.description: Conversation counts per day for the last 30 days.

schema.title: Response Get Daily Conversations Api V1 Stats Conversations Daily Get
Response Get Usage Api V1 Stats Usage Get
